cases.request: Fix a typo in README and run the normal release gate.
cases.rationale: Small edits should stay linear, keep budget bounded, and preserve release evidence without unnecessary workflow fan-out.

cases.request: Add a new run status field to the API response and persistence model.
cases.rationale: Runtime and API behavior must be classified as spec-first, trace the workflow decision, and receive independent verification.

cases.request: Rename the User domain model to Account across routes, tasks, tests, docs, and event payloads.
cases.rationale: A broad rename needs slice isolation, synthesis, and mechanical invariant checks across call sites.

cases.request: Verify every factual claim in a release note against code, tests, and logs before publishing.
cases.rationale: Claim checking must preserve sources, independently verify support, and inspect how the claims were produced.

cases.request: Research why provider latency increased by combining code paths, logs, metrics, and vendor notes.
cases.rationale: Research should fan out by source family, keep evidence traceable, and return a reviewable synthesis artifact.

cases.request: Review a proposed auth middleware change and validate whether it can be bypassed.
cases.rationale: Security work needs isolated untrusted input handling, independent exploitability review, and explicit sandbox boundaries.

cases.request: Mine the last six months of incidents, dedupe them, and identify recurring root causes with owners.
cases.rationale: Incident triage reads untrusted evidence, dedupes at scale, and loops only against explicit stop conditions.

cases.request: Generate many names for a CLI tool and choose the top three through rubric-based comparison.
cases.rationale: Taste-based selection is better handled by alternatives, rubric filtering, and a reviewable selection artifact.

cases.request: Coordinate a platform upgrade across several sessions where subtasks have blockers and dependencies.
cases.rationale: Long-running work needs durable task metadata, dependencies, blockers, and resumable evidence.

cases.request: Make local startup and smoke validation easier for future agents by improving logs, run commands, and runtime inspection output.
cases.rationale: Runtime legibility work must prove that an agent can start, inspect, and validate the running system.

cases.request: Turn repeated review misses into deterministic checks that fail when the mistake returns.
cases.rationale: Repeated failures should become reviewed examples plus durable tests, hooks, scripts, or evals.

cases.request: Mine repeated review corrections and turn the survivors into a reusable repo skill with gotchas and scripts.
cases.rationale: Skill evolution should package repeated workflows into focused triggerable guidance with mechanical gates where useful.
